name: Egg and Spinach Casserole
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Shredded Cheese (Monterey Jack or Chihuahua)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Spread the corn tortillas in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for about 5 minutes until lightly browned.
3. In a large skillet, heat butter or margarine over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sautéing until softened.
4. Add tomatoes and cook until they begin to break down, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in salt, pepper, nutmeg, spinach, and green sauce, mixing well.
6. Arrange the cooked eggs on top of the mixture.
7. Sprinkle shredded cheese evenly over the casserole.
8. Place the baked tortillas back into the oven for another 2-3 minutes until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
9. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
